name: Custom Emojis
description: Custom emojis migrate only as their emoji names. Slack does not provide a unique identifier/code for custom emojis via API, so we are unable to fully recreate them in Google Chat.

name: Stickers
description: Stickers are currently migrating as links. Improvement is planned and currently in the backlog.

name: GIFs
description: GIFs are currently migrating as links. Enhancement is in the backlog.

name: Canva Files
description: Canva files are migrating as .html files. Google Chat does not natively support Canva file format in this context, so we convert them to HTML during migration.

name: Multiple Files in Message
description: Google Chat does not support multiple files in a single message. The first file is migrated as a file and the remaining files are migrated as links.

name: Video Transcriptions
description: Video transcriptions are not migrating. Video transcriptions are not available on Google Chat side via API.

name: Audio Transcriptions
description: Audio transcriptions are not migrating. Audio transcriptions are not available on the Google Chat side via API.

name: Underlined Text
description: Underlined text is migrating as normal text. Fix is in the backlog.

name: Custom Reactions
description: Custom reactions are not migrating. Feature is currently in the backlog.

name: Saved Messages
description: Saved messages are migrating as normal messages (no saved state retained). We are not getting any info about who saved that message, so we cannot post this as a saved message to destination.

name: Pinned Messages
description: Pinned messages are migrating as normal messages (pin status not retained). Google Chat does not support migrating as pinned message through API. Feature is currently in the backlog.

name: User Groups
description: User groups are migrating as Group IDs only. Slack API provides only group ID, not complete group metadata, so equivalent groups are not automatically created in Google Chat.

name: Tagged Channels
description: If a message tags the same channel being migrated, the tag will migrate correctly. If a message tags another channel, it migrates as normal text when the referenced channel is not available in the destination environment.

name: Polly
description: Polly content is migrating as plain text only. Enhancement is in the backlog.

name: Workflows
description: Slack workflows are not currently supported in migration. Feature is in the backlog.

name: Edited Message Tag
description: Google Chat automatically generates the 'Edited' label only when edited inside Chat. During migration, the edited status cannot be preserved; message appears in latest version without Edited tag.

name: Forwarded Message
description: Forwarded messages are treated as normal messages. Source data structure does not allow identifying forwarded metadata. Feature is in the backlog.

name: Self Messages
description: Google Chat does not support self-messaging functionality, so self-messages cannot be migrated.
